en: What the hell was that do?
What's the story upstairs? The power surrounding the cube is impenetrable. Thor's right. We got to deal with these guys. How do we do this? As a team, I have unfinished business with Loki.
ko: 위에서는 무슨 상황이야? 큐브를 둘러싼 힘은 뚫을 수가 없어. 토르 말이 맞아. 이놈들을 처리해야 해. 어떻게 하지? 팀으로. 로키랑은 끝내지 못한 일이 있어.
